mnemonics: Masters Often Need Python Arrays Regularly
Numbers Create Visualizations Using Structured Arrays Rarely
keyPoints: A NumPy array is a collection of values of the same data type stored in a single block of memory.
Sorted arrays allow for efficient data retrieval and manipulation.
Structured arrays provide a way to store and manipulate data with multiple fields.
NumPy's structured arrays are implemented using a tuple of data types.
The dtype attribute of a NumPy array specifies its data type.
The shape attribute of a NumPy array specifies its dimensions.
The size attribute of a NumPy array specifies its total number of elements.
